emails.subject: Re: Physical Storage
emails.body: We don't have storage on PG&E do we? I think that is park and lend. What do you think? I have put together the schedules for Spindletop and Bammel. Dave Forwarded by David Baumbach/HOU/ECT on 03/12/2001 01:55 PM From: Jim Pond ENRON 03/12/2001 12:47 PM

emails.subject: Re: Physical Storage
emails.body: We do not have storage in a facility on PG&E. But, we do use parking and lending agreements regularly. D Enron Capital Management From: David Baumbach 03/12/2001 02:05 PM
